## Heading One

Some body text with ==highlighted== words and a %%hidden%% comment.

> [!note] An informational callout
> Body text inside the callout.

> [!warning]+ Collapsed warning
> Hidden by default.

## Block References

A paragraph with a block reference. ^block-id

## Math

Inline math: $E = mc^2$.

Display math:

$$
\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx = 1
$$

```mermaid
graph TD; A --> B;
```

```go
    fmt.Println("hello")
}
```
